title: Require Categorical Service Context Boundaries
forbids: a module current-owner alias import or re-export of root base, context, or middleware; a middleware source without a named direct native const; or a middleware default export
why: Modules inherit root context through the service anchor, while a named native middleware export keeps the context projection visible without duplicating the module import-surface law.
remediate: Keep root base, context, and middleware aliases out of modules. Give each middleware source a named direct const initialized from an exact imported os, base, service, or module binding, follow the module import-surface rule for its source, and remove default exports.
message: Service context must remain behind the service anchor and named native middleware.
